query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `investment_document_templates` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `templateType` ENUM('term_sheet', 'investment_agreement', 'revenue_share', 'profit_participation', 'convertible_note', 'loan_agreement', 'buyback_notice', 'sunset_notice') NOT NULL,
  `name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` TEXT,
  `templateContent` LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
  `requiredFields` JSON,
  `includesFirewallClause` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  `includesVetoClause` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  `includesBuybackClause` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  `includesSunsetClause` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  `isActive` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  `version` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:

  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `templateType` ENUM('term_sheet', 'investment_agreement', 'revenue_share', 'profit_participation', 'convertible_note', 'loan_agreement', 'buyback_notice', 'sunset_notice') NOT NULL,
  `name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` TEXT,
  `templateContent` LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
  `requiredFields` JSON,
  `includesFirewallClause` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  `includesVetoClause` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  `includesBuybackClause` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  `includesSunsetClause` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  `isActive` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  `version` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
